heading: Edit an Archiving Rule Through the Atlas CLI
body:
To update an online archive for a cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters onlineArchives update <archiveId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas clusters onlineArchives update](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-onlineArchives-update).
